title: oldenlandia cryptantha
intro: Oldenlandia cryptantha, also known as Phlomis cryptantha, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in various forms of medicine, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, due to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Oldenlandia cryptantha include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, which may help to reduce fever, alleviate coughs and colds, and support the body's natural defense mechanisms. In herbal preparations, Oldenlandia cryptantha is often dried and processed into teas, capsules, or tinctures, although its usage and preparation may vary depending on the specific application and cultural context.
